briefdescription.para: This function will set the channel IDs to correspond with the supplied channel ID based on the protocol.

detaileddescription.para: HDMI uses 3 channels; DP uses 4. This ID translation is done to allow other functions to operate iteratively over multiple channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the channel ID used to determine the indices.
is a pointer to the start channel ID to set.
is a pointer to the end channel ID to set.

simplesect.para: The contents of Id0 and Id1 will be set according to ChId.

briefdescription.para: This function will translate from XVphy_PllType to XVphy_SysClkDataSelType.

parameterdescription.para: is the PLL type to translate.

simplesect.para: The reference clock type based on the PLL selection.

briefdescription.para: This function will translate from XVphy_PllType to XVphy_SysClkOutSelType.

parameterdescription.para: is the PLL type to translate.

simplesect.para: The reference clock type based on the PLL selection.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u32 PllClkInFreqHz)
memberdef.name: XVphy_PllCalculator

briefdescription.para: This function will try to find the necessary PLL divisor values to produce the configured line rate given the specified PLL input frequency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to calculate the PLL values for.
is the channel ID to calculate the PLL values for.
is an indicator for TX or RX.

is the PLL input frequency on which to base the calculations on. A value of 0 indicates to use the currently configured quad PLL reference clock. A non-zero value indicates to ignore what is currently configured in SW, and use a custom frequency instead.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if valid PLL values were found to satisfy the constraints.

simplesect.para: If successful, the channel's PllParams structure will be modified with the valid PLL parameters.

briefdescription.para: This function writes the current software configuration for the reference clock selections to hardware for the specified quad on all channels.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_PllRefClkSelType RefClkSel)
memberdef.name: XVphy_CfgPllRefClkSel

briefdescription.para: Configure the PLL reference clock selection for the specified channel(s).

detaileddescription.para: This is applied to both direction to the software configuration only.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to operate on.
is the reference clock selection to configure.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, XVphy_SysClkDataSelType SysClkDataSel)
memberdef.name: XVphy_CfgSysClkDataSel

briefdescription.para: Configure the SYSCLKDATA reference clock selection for the direction.

detaileddescription.para: Same configuration applies to all channels in the quad. This is applied to the software configuration only.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the reference clock selection to configure.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, XVphy_SysClkOutSelType SysClkOutSel)
memberdef.name: XVphy_CfgSysClkOutSel

briefdescription.para: Configure the SYSCLKOUT reference clock selection for the direction.

detaileddescription.para: Same configuration applies to all channels in the quad. This is applied to the software configuration only.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the reference clock selection to configure.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u32 PllClkInFreqHz)
memberdef.name: XVphy_ClkCalcParams

briefdescription.para: This function will try to find the necessary PLL divisor values to produce the configured line rate given the specified PLL input frequency.

detaileddescription.para: This will be done for all channels specified by ChId. This function is a wrapper for XVphy_PllCalculator.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to calculate the PLL values for.
is the channel ID to calculate the PLL values for.
is an indicator for TX or RX.

is the PLL input frequency on which to base the calculations on. A value of 0 indicates to use the currently configured quad PLL reference clock. A non-zero value indicates to ignore what is currently configured in SW, and use a custom frequency instead.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if valid PLL values were found to satisfy the constraints.

simplesect.para: If successful, the channel's PllParams structure will be modified with the valid PLL parameters.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir)
memberdef.name: XVphy_OutDivReconfig

briefdescription.para: This function will set the current output divider configuration over DRP.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID for which to write the settings for.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the configuration was successful.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir)
memberdef.name: XVphy_DirReconfig

briefdescription.para: This function will set the current RX/TX configuration over DRP.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID for which to write the settings for.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the configuration was successful.

briefdescription.para: This function will set the current clocking settings for each channel to hardware based on the configuration stored in the driver's instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID for which to write the settings for.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the configuration was successful.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, XVphy_PllType PllType)
memberdef.name: XVphy_GetRcfgChId

briefdescription.para: Obtain the reconfiguration channel ID for given PLL type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the PLL type being used by the channel.

simplesect.para: The Channel ID to be used for reconfiguration

briefdescription.para: Obtain the current reference clock frequency for the quad based on the reference clock type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the type to obtain the clock selection for.

simplesect.para: The current reference clock frequency for the quad for the specified type selection.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, XVphy_ChannelId ChId)
memberdef.name: XVphy_GetSysClkDataSel

briefdescription.para: Obtain the current [RT]XSYSCLKSEL[0] configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the channel ID which to operate on.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, XVphy_ChannelId ChId)
memberdef.name: XVphy_GetSysClkOutSel

briefdescription.para: Obtain the current [RT]XSYSCLKSEL[1] configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is the channel ID which to operate on.

briefdescription.para: This function will check the status of a PLL lock on the specified channel.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the specified PLL is locked.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XVphy_GtUserRdyEnable

briefdescription.para: This function will reset and enable the Video PHY's user core logic.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID which to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the reset if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then enable.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u32 FreeRunClkFreq)
memberdef.name: XVphy_Gthe4CfgCpllCalPeriodandTol

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u32 FreeRunClkFreq)
memberdef.name: XVphy_Gtye4CfgCpllCalPeriodandTol

briefdescription.para: This function will write the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) values currently stored in the driver's instance structure to hardware .

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the MMCM write was successful.
XST_FAILURE otherwise, if the configuration success bit did not go low.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XVphy_MmcmReset

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the reset if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then enable.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir, u8 Enable)
memberdef.name: XVphy_MmcmLockedMaskEnable

briefdescription.para: This function will reset the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.
is an indicator whether to "Enable" the locked mask if set to 1. If set to 0: reset, then disable.

briefdescription.para: This function will get the lock status of the mixed-mode clock manager (MMCM) core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is an indicator for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function obtains the divider value of the BUFG_GT peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is an indicator for TX or RX
3-bit divider value

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, u8 Hold)
memberdef.name: XVphy_PowerDownGtPll

briefdescription.para: This function will power down the specified GT PLL.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to power down the PLL for.
is an indicator whether to "hold" the power down if set to 1. If set to 0: power down, then power back up.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for the specified handler type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVPhy instance.
is the interrupt handler type which specifies which interrupt event to attach the callback for.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function enables interrupts associated with the specified interrupt type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is the interrupt type/mask to enable.

briefdescription.para: This function disabled interrupts associated with the specified interrupt type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is the interrupt type/mask to disable.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the error IRQ register based on the condition to generate an ERR_IRQ event.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is the IRQ type as defined in XVphy_ErrType.
is the flag to set or clear the ErrIrq param.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVphy *InstancePtr, u8 QuadId, XVphy_ChannelId ChId, XVphy_DirectionType Dir)
memberdef.name: XVphy_GetPllVcoFreqHz

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the PLL VCO operating frequency.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.
is the GT quad ID to operate on.
is the channel ID to calculate the VCO frequency for.
is an indicator for TX or RX.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the number of active reference clock sources based in the CFG.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if Instance is HDMI 2.0 or HDMI 2.1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VPHY instance.
is an indicator for RX or TX.

simplesect.para: TRUE if HDMI 2.0 or 2.1 else FALSE.

briefdescription.para: This function is the error condition handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VPHY instance.
